_label_note: AE Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered UAE trade-licence precision/full-code capture, public/generic IVR and contact-centre phone bait, public non-binding MoU wording, negated genetic-data prose, Unicode spa-day bait, masked Emirates-ID fragments, phone-like device/date fragments, and Arabic-style hyphenated names. Generated invalid/placeholder Emirates ID and trade-licence labels were removed from strict must_detect when current deterministic strict mode suppresses them.
_label_tier_note: AE Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: please do not include personal identifiers in open emails

must_detect.matched_text:
To: Board Compliance Committee, Oasis Reef Holdings Ltd (ADGM Registration ORH-TEST-4127)
Subject: PDPL readiness and market conduct review for the PalmGate onboarding suite (DFSA/SCA context)
Scope covers processing by Oasis Reef Operations (DIFC branch) for client Nahala Payments FZ-LLC (Trade Licence TL-5931-TEST) and internal HR workflows.
Under PDPL, we mapped fields: Emirates ID (masked placeholder only; example: EID-0000-XXXX-TEST), nationality, and contact role mailboxes; no copies of government IDs are stored.
Form labels include “Family origin (optional)” and “Religion (do not ask)”; both are disabled per PDPL Data Minimisation Standard v2.1.
Positive special-category reference: Data Subject ORH-EMP-1193 (employee code) has HR medical leave documentation indicating ongoing treatment for Type 2 diabetes under the company clinic.
Access to ORH-EMP-1193’s file is restricted to the HR Medical Inbox and the Data Protection Officer; no Emirates ID or biometric data is linked to that case.
Market conduct: our investor-relations team used only publicly announced items from the ADGM FSRA Public Register and DFSA/SCA circulars; no unpublished issuer information or analyst guidance is attached.
References to issuer “Dune Meridian PJSC” relate solely to its already-published 2024 Q1 results; no board papers, ratings actions, or trading instructions are present.
Any timetable examples in PalmGate workflows use dummy symbols (e.g., ISIN TEST-ADGM-000) and invalid dates (31/02/2026) to avoid MNPI.
